docs.title: Welcome to my portfolio!
docs.text: I'm a front-end developer with expertise in React.js, CSS frameworks, and a variety of programming languages. Currently studying Computer Science at Curtin University while working on freelance web development projects.

docs.title: Skills Highlight
docs.text:
• Front-End: React.js, Bootstrap, TailwindCSS
  • Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Python, Java, Kotlin, Zig
  • Web Development: Full-stack applications, API integration
  • Systems: Linux System Administration
  • Other: Time Management, Problem Solving

docs.title: Contact Information
docs.text:
Feel free to reach out to me at:

  • Email: isaacmpascoe@gmail.com
  • LinkedIn: Isaac Pascoe

Feel free to reach out for collaborations or opportunities!

docs.title: Hey, I'm Isaac!
docs.text: I'm a front-end developer and Computer Science student with a passion for building web applications and exploring diverse programming languages. I specialize in React.js development and enjoy working with modern CSS frameworks like Bootstrap and TailwindCSS.

docs.title: Professional Background
docs.text:
As a freelance web developer since December 2022, I've:

  • Collaborated on developing an online will-producing website with a Golang API connected to a back-end database
  • Built an online web application tracking donations of Australian charitable organizations using a Python-based API connected to a NoSQL database
  • Focused on creating responsive, user-friendly interfaces with React.js and CSS frameworks like Bootstrap and TailwindCSS

docs.title: Education
docs.text:
Bachelor of Computing, Computer Science Curtin University (2023 - Present)

Western Australian Certificate of Education Como Secondary College (2017 - 2022)

docs.title: Projects
docs.text: Here are some of the key projects I've worked on. Each represents different aspects of my skills and interests in software development.

docs.title: Online Will-Producing Website
docs.text:
A collaborative project focused on developing a web platform for creating legal wills online.

Technologies Used:

  • React.js (Frontend)
  • Golang (API Development)
  • Database Integration
  • User Authentication

Key Features:

  • Document generation system
  • Secure data handling
  • User-friendly interface
  • Legal compliance

docs.title: Donation Tracking Application
docs.text:
A web application for tracking donations made to Australian charitable organizations.

Technologies Used:

  • Python (API Development)
  • NoSQL Database
  • Web Frontend
  • Data Visualization

Key Features:

  • Donation analytics
  • Organization profiles
  • Reporting system
  • User account management

docs.title: Smash Return
docs.text:
A mobile idle game with the inspiration from keyboard keys.

Technologies Used:

  • Kotlin (Android Development)
  • Game Development
  • Mobile App Design

docs.title: ZMM 2.0
docs.text:
Repository: impascoe/zmm-2.0

A modern personal C compiler written in Zig for educational purposes.

Technologies Used:

  • Zig Programming Language
  • Compiler Design

Key Features:

  • Lexical analysis
  • Syntax parsing
  • Compiles to x86-64 assembly

docs.title: Dotfiles
docs.text:
Repository: impascoe/dotfiles

My personal configuration files for development environments.

Technologies Used:

  • Shell Scripting
  • Linux Configuration
  • Development Environment Setup

Key Features:

  • Customized development environment
  • Productivity enhancements
  • Cross-platform configurations

docs.title: Other Projects
docs.text:
I'm constantly working on new ideas and contributing to various development initiatives. Check out my GitHub profile for the latest updates on what I'm building.

Interested in collaborating on a project? Contact me!
